events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still Mick Jagger moves like no other. Happy birthday to the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones!

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever played.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when music videos changed everything? 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles. What was the first video you ever saw on MTV?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, launching the band into superstardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kicked off a Britpop revolution. Still sounds as fresh and vital today.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, commenced on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in time.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 years old.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His music, his style, his legend lives on.

events.title: Tupac Shakur passed away 30 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur tragically passed away in Las Vegas, he would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Impact
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on music and culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970, he would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. Still inspiring guitarists worldwide.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this timeless masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend with a voice that still commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Britpop Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single on this day in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put 1,000 songs in your pocket.

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Grab a martini (shaken, not stirred) – it's James Bond Day! Which Bond film or theme song is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon. Imagine.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' ambitious double album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but widely known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unveiled their sprawling 'White Album'. Which track from this diverse record is your favourite?
